findings.message: Settings query error is not handled. If fetchUserSettings fails, the user will see a successful profile load but missing settings data with no indication of the error.
findings.suggestion: Destructure error from the settings query (e.g., `error: settingsError`) and display appropriate error state or fallback UI when settings fail to load.

findings.message: Missing loading state handling. Users will see no content while the user query is pending, which could appear as a broken interface.
findings.suggestion:
Add loading state check: `if (isLoading) return
Loading...
;` or similar loading indicator before the error check.
